title: Nigeria Advances Agricultural Transformation Through Digital Innovation - FinancialEDGE
description: As part of its commitment to enhancing agricultural productivity and fostering food security in Nigeria, the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation (BMGF), in partnership with the African Forum for Agricultural Advisory Services (AFAAS), hosted a stakeholder convening to validate plans for a transformative PPP DAES solution.
